class:
TYPEID_N5POZ_HIST_STAN n5poz_hist_stan Pozycja historii stanowisk
pstn_pStanowisko Odwołanie do stanowiska TYPEID_N5STANOWISKO
pstn_dDataOd SQLdate Data od null
pstn_dDataDo SQLdate Data do null
XDF_EXTRAS_OBJ(pstn_)
function n5poz_hist_stan_befins() n5poz_hist_stan_befins = true end function
function n5poz_hist_stan_befupd() n5poz_hist_stan_befupd = true end function
function n5poz_hist_stan_befdel() n5poz_hist_stan_befdel = true end function
